title: hieracium scaberulum
intro: Hieracium scaberulum, also known as rough hawk's beard, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Hieracium scaberulum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health, as well as its ability to act as a natural diuretic. Hieracium scaberulum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
